subject: Car accident
body:
I had a car accident. Was hit from behind by a speedbump. The car after me
didn't pay attention and hit me pretty hard. My car got totalled, but since
it's a rental it was towed and replaced on the spot.

I'm fine.
always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
